nasb.text: it seemed fitting for me as well, having investigated everything carefully from the beginning, to write it out for you in consecutive order, most excellent Theophilus;

esv.text: it seemed good to me also, having followed all things closely for some time past, to write an orderly account for you, most excellent Theophilus,

cnv.text: 我已經把這些事從頭考查過，認為也應該按著次序寫給你，

ccb.text: 我把一切事情从头至尾仔细查考之后，决定按次序写出来，

csbs.text: 我也已经从头仔细地追踪了这一切，我就认为应该按着次序写给您，
